text.title: max-turns-circuit-breaker Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for max-turns-circuit-breaker. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Set max_turns explicitly on every production agent invocation (5-10 retrieval, 15-20 coding) and wrap the call in a try/except that handles MaxTurnsExceeded by summarizing the partial trajectory with a cheap model and returning a graceful reply.
rule.rationale: Tool loops fail by silent budget burn — the LLM treats each tool result as progress regardless of whether the goal is closer. A hard cap is the only deterministic stop. Catching the exception (instead of letting it bubble) preserves the partial trace and turns a 500 into a usable answer.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r-advanced' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r-default-high' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r-default-low' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.
